qualification.education_qualification: First Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.B.A or equivalent Master Degree in Management/relevant specialization and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in Bachelor's Degree with Good Academic Record, Ph. D. (in appropriate branch) with first Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in Bachelor's Degree and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.B.A. with Good Academic Record
qualification.details: First Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.B.A or equivalent Master Degree in Management/relevant specialization and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in Bachelor's Degree with Good Academic Record OR Ph. D. (in appropriate branch) with first Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in Bachelor's Degree and 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.B.A. with Good Academic Record. Desirable: Two years of post-qualification teaching experience in National Level Institute. Specializations: Business Analytics/Data Analytics/ Business Statistics & Computing/Marketing/Operation Management/ Human Resource Development/Finance/Entrepreneurship/Economics/Organizational Management/Management Information System and other related area.

salary_details.details: (i) For M.B.A/equivalent Master Degree-Consolidated pay of Rs 45,000 (ii) For PhD-Consolidated Pay Rs 60,000

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Teaching Assistant at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat (SVNIT).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are 0 vacancies announced for the Teaching Assistant post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for this position?
faq.answer: The last date for application is the Walk-in date, which is 13 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a First Class or equivalent CGPA in MBA or equivalent Master's Degree in Management and a First Class or equivalent CGPA in Bachelor's Degree, or a Ph.D. with specific academic records.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Teaching Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Teaching Assistant post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistant role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 45,000 per month for MBA/equivalent degree holders and Rs. 60,000 per month for PhD holders.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology Surat, Gujarat, Surat - 395007.
